products.name: Callio
products.tagline: AI sales calling for Indian businesses. ElevenLabs voice + Tata Tele + your CRM.
products.description: Multi-tenant AI sales agent that calls leads, qualifies them, books demos, and writes the CRM note — running on Indian telecom infrastructure with TRAI-compliant DLT.

features.title: Sub-15ms voice latency
features.desc: On Tata Tele SIP, indistinguishable from human SDRs.

features.title: Multi-tenant from day one
features.desc: Self-serve onboarding, automated provisioning per workspace.

features.title: CRM-native
features.desc: HubSpot, Zoho, Salesforce, Leadsquared. Logs every turn.

features.title: Hindi + English bilingual
features.desc: Trained on Indian conversational patterns, not American scripts.

products.name: Trubetix
products.tagline: Reports and analytics that make sense to founders, not just analysts.
products.description: Auto-generated weekly intelligence reports for B2B operators — fed by your CRM, ad accounts, and product analytics. Insights, not dashboards.

features.title: Auto-narrative reports
features.desc: A weekly written briefing — what changed, why, and what to do.

features.title: Cross-platform aggregation
features.desc: Meta, Google, LinkedIn, GA4, Mixpanel, Stripe, Razorpay.

features.title: Founder-readable
features.desc: No dashboard archaeology — the answer is the email.

products.name: Strike Audit
products.tagline: GEO + AEO + SEO audit tool. Rank in Google, get cited by ChatGPT.
products.description: Audit your visibility across the new search stack — Google, AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini. One score. One action list.

features.title: LLM citation tracking
features.desc: See which queries surface your brand — and which surface competitors.

features.title: Schema diagnostics
features.desc: Detects missing FAQ, HowTo, Article, Product schemas.

features.title: Answer-engine readiness
features.desc: Scores content against the structures LLMs prefer to quote.

products.name: Whatspipe
products.tagline: WhatsApp → Blog publishing pipeline. Voice notes become indexed essays.
products.description: Send a voice note. Get a polished, SEO-ready article published to your blog in minutes. Built for solo operators and small teams who think faster than they type.

features.title: Schema + image generation
features.desc: Featured image, meta tags, structured data — automatic.

services.name: AI Consulting
services.tagline: The diagnostic-first approach to AI strategy.
services.longDescription: Most AI strategy consulting is a deck and a handshake. Ours is a 30-day diagnostic: we map your processes, find where AI actually moves the P&L, and walk away with either a build plan or an honest skip recommendation.

services.name: Automation Engineering
services.longDescription: End-to-end automation across sales, ops, content, and finance — built on workflow tools, custom services, and your existing stack.

services.name: Funnel Building
services.longDescription: A funnel is a sequence: traffic source, page, form, routing, nurture, and close. We build all of it, instrumented from day one.

services.name: AI Agents
services.tagline: Voice and text agents that close, qualify, and follow up.
services.longDescription: We build agents that operate, not chatbots that answer. Every agent ships with observability and human escalation.

services.name: GEO / AEO Strategy
services.tagline: Get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
services.longDescription: We rebuild your content stack — schema, structure, citations, and entity authority — to be the source LLMs prefer to quote.

services.name: Outcome Engineering
services.tagline: We work on outcomes. You pay when it works.
services.longDescription: For specific high-leverage projects, we structure engagements around outcomes: pipeline generated, MRR added, cost per lead reduced.

faqs.q: How is Cheetah AGI different from a typical AI consultancy?
faqs.a: Most consultancies sell decks. We ship systems and measure ourselves on revenue impact.

faqs.q: Do you work with companies outside India?
faqs.a: Yes. We are headquartered in Lucknow, India and operate globally.

faqs.q: What is GEO / AEO, and why do I need it?
faqs.a: GEO and AEO are the disciplines of getting cited in AI-generated answers.

posts.title: GEO, AEO, SEO: the new shape of being findable
posts.excerpt: Search is splitting into three modes. Here is how to win all of them without writing three content strategies.
posts.body:
Search is splitting into three modes.

## Why this matters now

The shift in how people find information is no longer hypothetical. AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini are routing a growing share of intent away from the ten blue links.

## The mechanics

Generative engines assemble answers. They do not rank pages in the same way search engines do. The unit of optimization is the passage that gets cited.

## What we recommend

Audit your highest-intent pages against schema coverage, author transparency, and quotable passage density. Most B2B sites have a wide gap here.
